allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$errors = \\$null
[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(\(Resolve-Path 'init.ps1'\).Path, [ref]\\$null, [ref]\\$errors\) | Out-Null
if \(\\$errors.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host 'init.ps1: OK' } else { \\$errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\$_ } }

[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(\(Resolve-Path 'install.ps1'\).Path, [ref]\\$null, [ref]\\$errors\) | Out-Null
if \(\\$errors.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host 'install.ps1: OK' } else { \\$errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\$_ } }
")
